title_en: OpenAI Buys Personal Finance Startup Hiro for ChatGPT Integration
summary_en: OpenAI acquired AI personal finance startup Hiro to build financial planning capabilities into ChatGPT. This signals major expansion into lucrative fintech services.

title_en: Vercel CEO Signals IPO as AI Agents Drive Revenue Surge
summary_en: Vercel benefits massively from AI app explosion as developers build more agents and applications. The 10-year-old platform prepares for public offering.

title_en: Cloudflare Launches Agent Cloud with OpenAI GPT-5.4 Integration
summary_en: Enterprises can now build and deploy AI agents at scale using Cloudflare's new Agent Cloud platform. Features OpenAI's latest GPT-5.4 and Codex models.

title_en: ChatGPT for Operations Teams: Streamline Workflows Guide
summary_en: Learn how operations teams use ChatGPT to streamline workflows and improve coordination. Practical strategies for standardizing processes and faster execution.

title_en: ChatGPT for Finance Teams: Data Analysis and Reporting
summary_en: Finance professionals discover how ChatGPT streamlines reporting, analyzes data, and improves forecasting. Clear strategies for communicating insights effectively.

title_en: ChatGPT for Marketing Teams: Campaign Planning to Execution
summary_en: Marketing teams learn to use ChatGPT for campaign planning, content generation, and performance analysis. Move from ideas to execution faster.

title_en: Brainstorming with ChatGPT: Turn Ideas into Action Plans
summary_en: Master ChatGPT brainstorming techniques to organize thinking and transform rough concepts into structured, actionable business plans with proven prompts.

title_en: Writing with ChatGPT: Draft, Revise and Refine Content
summary_en: Learn professional writing techniques with ChatGPT to create content with clear structure and tone. Essential prompts for drafting and revision.

title_en: Microsoft Builds Enterprise OpenClaw Agent with Better Security
summary_en: Microsoft develops enterprise-focused AI agent similar to OpenClaw but with enhanced security controls. Targets business customers with safer automation.

title_en: Anthropic Claude Performance Issues: Users Report Major Degradation
summary_en: Developers report significant performance drops in Claude Opus 4.6 and Claude Code models. Company faces growing criticism over capability reductions.

title_en: Intuit Compresses Months of Tax Work into Hours with AI
summary_en: TurboTax team used AI to implement 900-page tax legislation in days instead of months. Workflow template adaptable for any regulated industry team.

title_en: AI Overviews Cut Paid Search Clicks by 58% - How Teams Adapt
summary_en: Google's AI Overviews appear in 30% of searches, dramatically reducing click-through rates. Paid search teams share adaptation strategies for answer engines.

title_en: How High-Growth Companies Actually Measure Marketing ROI
summary_en: Marketing attribution challenges solved: discover what high-growth companies measure instead of vanity metrics. Data-driven frameworks that drive real growth.

title_en: LinkedIn Post Boost Guide: Generate More Business Leads
summary_en: 89% of B2B buyers use LinkedIn for vetting. Learn proven strategies to boost post visibility and convert LinkedIn engagement into business revenue.

title_en: Billboard Business Guide: $30k Monthly Part-Time Income
summary_en: Chris Brown built his billboard side hustle to $30,000 monthly working part-time. Learn how he owns 30 billboards and retired at 42.

title_en: 28 Odd Job Apps: Make Up to $100/Hour Spare Time
summary_en: Flexible odd job apps help you earn money on your schedule. Complete guide to highest-paying platforms for spare time income generation.

title_en: Get Paid for Your Data: 17 Ways Up to $500 Yearly
summary_en: Big data generates $270 billion by 2026, and your personal data has value. Discover legitimate ways to monetize your information for extra income.

title_en: Enterprise AI Adoption Grows But Companies Keep Human Control
summary_en: Companies expand AI adoption while avoiding fully autonomous systems, especially in high-risk sectors. Focus remains on human-assisted decision making tools.

title_en: Anthropic's Secret AI Model Finds Thousands of Security Vulnerabilities
summary_en: Claude Mythos Preview discovered thousands of cybersecurity flaws across major systems. Anthropic keeps model private, shares findings with organizations instead.

title_en: Meta Abandons Open-Source AI, Launches Proprietary Model
summary_en: Meta shifts from open-source Llama to proprietary AI models under new Superintelligence Labs. Major change in company's AI development strategy.
